chapter_title.en: Chapter on Establishing Ihram, Its Conditions, Nullification, and the Prayer for it

text: 2561 - سَأَلَهُ حُمْرَانُ بْنُ أَعْيَنَ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَقُولُ حُلَّنِي حَيْثُ حَبَسْتَنِي قَالَ «هُوَ حِلٌّ حَيْثُ حَبَسَهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ قَالَ أَوْ لَمْ يَقُلْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2561 - Humran ibn A'yan asked Imam (as) about a person who says, "Release me where You have restrained me."
Imam (as) said: "He is released where Allah (swt), the Almighty, has restrained him, whether he says it or does not say it."
